description_long: This is a rustic log cabin constructed primarily from horizontally stacked wooden logs, featuring a curved, shingled roof with a prominent chimney on one side. The front facade displays a small wooden door with a stone step, flanked by two rectangular windows with yellowish panes. The side elevation reveals three tall, arched windows arranged symmetrically, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The cabin is elevated on short wooden stilts, with a set of steps leading up to the entrance and a small overhanging awning above the rear door. The roof is composed of overlapping wooden shingles, giving it a weathered, natural appearance. The overall design is compact and functional, evoking a traditional log cabin aesthetic suitable for residential use in a rural or park-like urban setting.
description: A compact log cabin with a curved shingled roof, prominent chimney, and symmetrical arched windows, elevated on wooden stilts with a small front entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door, two rectangular windows, stone step, and part of the chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting three tall, arched windows, the full length of the curved roof, and the chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view with a small window, stone step, chimney, and the back of the curved roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear door under an awning, a single arched window, and the roof curvature.
attribute_roof_type: curved, shingled roof with a single chimney and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Five windows in total: two small rectangular windows on the front and rear, three tall arched windows symmetrically arranged on one side, all with a regular, symmetrical pattern
attribute_door_placement: One main door centered on the front facade, one secondary door at the rear under an awning
